US: US1 - Switch between "All Chats" and "Unread" view
Title: Switch to Unread view
Step:
Precondition: User is on the main chat dashboard in the "All Chats" view
1. SELECT the "Unread" category filter
Expectation: - SHOULD transition to the filtered view and display only messages with an "Unread" status

Title: Switch back to All Chats view
Step:
Precondition: User is currently viewing the "Unread" filtered list
1. SELECT the "All Chats" category view
Expectation:
- SHOULD remove the filter
- SHOULD display all messages (Read and Unread) in chronological order

AC: AC2 - Switching back to All Chats
Title: Verify All Chats display order
Expectation: - SHOULD see all messages in chronological order

US: US2 - "Unread" view filters out read messages
Title: Apply Unread filter with mixed messages
Step:
Precondition: User has a total of 10 messages (7 Read, 3 Unread)
1. APPLY the "Unread" filter

Title: Verify only Unread messages visible
Expectation: - SHOULD display only the 3 Unread" messages in the list"

AC: AC2 - Empty state for Unread filter
Title: Display empty state when no unread messages
Step:
Precondition: User has no messages with an "Unread" status
1. CLICK on the "Unread" filter
Expectation: - SHOULD display a "No unread messages" empty state or placeholder

US: US3 - Message being read remains visible (Sticky View)
AC: AC1 - Opening an unread message (Sticky View)
Title: Open unread message and verify status change
Step:
Precondition: User is in the "Unread" filter view
1. CLICK on an unread message (Message A)
Expectation: - SHOULD change the status of Message A to "Read"

Title: Verify unread count decrements
Expectation: - SHOULD decrement the Unread Count by 1

Title: Verify message remains visible in list
Expectation: - SHOULD keep Message A visible in the current list view

AC: AC2 - Removing previously read message upon new selection
Title: Select second unread message and verify first message removed
Step:
Precondition: User is in the "Unread" filter view and has just read Message A (which is still visible)
1. CLICK on a different unread message (Message B)
Expectation: - SHOULD immediately remove Message A from the "Unread" list

Title: Verify second message becomes active and visible
Expectation: - SHOULD make Message B the active "Read" message but remain visible

Title: Navigate away and return to verify cleanup
Step:
Precondition: User has read a message in the "Unread" view but it is still visible due to the sticky logic
1. NAVIGATE away to "All Chats"
2. CLICK back into the "Unread" filter
Expectation: - SHOULD no longer display the previously read message in the "Unread" list
